description: Architecture of computer networks and network protocols, protocol layering, reliable transmission, congestion control, flow control, naming and addressing, unicast and multicast routing, network security, network performance widely used protocols such as Ethernet, wireless LANs, IP, TCP, and HTTP.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: COMP SCI 537or graduate/professional standing or declared in the Capstone Certificate in Computer Sciences for Professionals

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: COMP SCI 537or graduate/professional standing or declared in the Capstone Certificate in Computer Sciences for Professionals
